0.text: Answer only using retrieved hotel knowledge. If information is unavailable, state that it is not available in the knowledge base. Never invent prices, availability, booking links, payment links, room inventory, discounts, reservations, policies, facilities, amenities, room types, payment instructions, or hotel services.

1.text: The Regal Aurum New Delhi's standard check-in time is 3:00 PM and check-out is 11:00 AM. Early check-in before 7:00 AM requires paying the full previous night's room rate. Between 7:00 AM and 10:00 AM, a 50% charge of the nightly rate applies. From 10:00 AM to 3:00 PM, a fee of ₹2,500 per hour plus 18% GST is charged. If the room is not ready upon arrival, guests receive complimentary luggage storage, fitness centre shower access, and pool area invitation until the room is ready.

2.text: Late check-out at The Regal Aurum is possible with prior approval. Until 1:00 PM it is complimentary if requested at least 4 hours before the standard 11:00 AM check-out. If the hotel cannot accommodate, free luggage storage and fitness centre showers are offered. Between 1:00 PM and 4:00 PM, 50% of the nightly room rate (excluding GST) is charged. After 4:00 PM, the full nightly rate applies. Unauthorised overstay automatically incurs the full nightly rate.

3.text: For standard rate reservations at The Regal Aurum, free cancellation is allowed until 3:00 PM local time, 72 hours prior to arrival. Cancellations made within 72 hours of arrival result in a penalty of one night's room charge including taxes. No-shows are charged the full stay up to a maximum of three nights on the guaranteed credit card.

4.text: Non-refundable or advance purchase rates at The Regal Aurum require full payment at the time of booking and are completely non-cancellable, non-modifiable, and non-refundable under any circumstances.

5.text: At The Regal Aurum, up to two children under 10 years old can stay for free using existing bedding. A complimentary infant crib is available for ages 0-2 upon request. An extra rollaway bed costs ₹2,000 per night plus 18% GST, but only one is allowed per room and only in Premier and Club Aurum Rooms, not in the Maharaja Suite. The extra bed must be requested at reservation time; same-day placement is not guaranteed.

6.text: The Premier Room at The Regal Aurum measures 420 sq ft (39 sq m) and costs ₹22,000 per night exclusive of 18% GST. Amenities include a king or twin beds, marble bathroom with rain shower and tub, Maison de Luxe toiletries, 55-inch 4K TV, minibar, Nespresso machine with 4 free daily capsules, electric kettle with teas, laptop safe, iron, free Wi-Fi (50 Mbps, 4 devices), blackout curtains, and a pillow menu with five options.

7.text: The Club Aurum Room at The Regal Aurum is 520 sq ft (48 sq m) and priced at ₹35,000 per night plus 18% GST. It includes all Premier Room features plus exclusive Club Aurum Lounge access (all-day refreshments, evening cocktails 6-8 PM, 2-hour private meeting room), one-way BMW 5 Series airport transfer, butler service (7 AM-11 PM), upgraded Maison de Luxe bath products, weighted blanket choice, 6 daily Nespresso capsules, and a welcome fruit and chocolate platter replenished once per stay.

8.text: The Maharaja Suite at The Regal Aurum spans 2,200 sq ft (204 sq m) and costs ₹1,40,000 per night plus 18% GST. It features a grand living room with piano and 65-inch OLED TV, dining room for 8, private study, pantry with microwave and wine chiller, master bedroom with four-poster bed and walk-in closet, marble spa bathroom with Jacuzzi, steam shower, and hammam, Hermès toiletries, guest powder room, complimentary round-trip BMW 7 Series transfers (Mercedes S-Class on request), 24/7 butler, in-suite breakfast for 4, complimentary minibar (non-alcoholic and house spirits), B&O sound system, 4 garments pressed daily, shoe shine, and a 350 sq ft private terrace.

9.text: The Sanctum Spa at The Regal Aurum operates daily from 8:00 AM to 9:00 PM with the last treatment booking at 8:00 PM. Steam and sauna close at 8:30 PM. The minimum age is 16. Appointments need 4 hours advance booking. Cancellation within 2 hours incurs a 50% charge, no-shows 100%. A health questionnaire is mandatory. A 2-hour wellness pass for non-treatment guests costs ₹2,500 per person and includes steam/sauna access.

10.text: At The Sanctum Spa, Ayurvedic therapy prices (all exclusive of 18% GST): Abhyanga (60 min) ₹7,500, Shirodhara (45 min) ₹8,000, Udwarthanam (50 min) ₹6,500. Massage options: Balinese Deep Tissue 60/90 min ₹6,500/₹8,500, Aromatherapy 60 min ₹5,500, Thai Stretching 90 min ₹8,000. Facials: Signature Radiance 75 min ₹7,000, Gold Radiance Lift 90 min ₹9,500. The Aurum Royal Indulgence body ritual is ₹11,000 for 120 minutes. Salon services start from ₹2,200 for hair styling.

11.text: Zafran, the signature Indian fine dining restaurant at The Regal Aurum, serves dinner from 7:00 PM to 11:30 PM (last food order 11:00 PM, drinks until 11:15 PM). A Sunday Royal Brunch operates seasonally (October-March) from 12:30 PM to 3:30 PM. A strict dress code applies: gentlemen need collared shirt, trousers, closed shoes (jackets preferred, loaners available); ladies should wear smart ethnic or formal evening wear. No shorts, sandals, or sleeveless T-shirts for those over 10. Children under 10 are not allowed after 8:00 PM.

12.text: Zafran offers tasting menus: 'Shahi Dawat' vegetarian 5-course at ₹4,000 per person and 'Nawabi Dastarkhwan' non-vegetarian 7-course at ₹5,000 per person, exclusive of taxes and alcohol. À la carte signatures: Galouti Kebab ₹1,600, Dum Pukht Gosht Biryani ₹2,200, Lobster Balchao ₹3,200, Nalli Nihari ₹2,000, Dal Zafran ₹1,100. Reservations are recommended; cancellations within 3 hours or no-shows incur ₹1,500 per person. Outside food and celebration cakes are prohibited.

13.text: The Skyline Plunge Pool & Sundeck at The Regal Aurum is open for swimming from 7:00 AM to 8:00 PM daily. Adult-only swimming (18+) is from 6:00 PM to 8:00 PM; children must leave by 6:00 PM. The Sundeck bar serves from 11:00 AM to 7:00 PM. Maximum capacity is 25 bathers, first-come first-served with no lounger reservations. Proper swimwear is mandatory; no cotton T-shirts, denim, or street clothes in the water. Infants/toddlers need swim diapers. Children under 12 must be directly supervised and stay in the shallow end. No glassware or outside food allowed; order exclusively from the Sundeck Bar menu.

14.text: The poolside menu at the Skyline Plunge Pool includes: Caesar salad ₹1,100, grilled sandwich ₹1,300, fresh fruit platter ₹800, coconut water ₹500, smoothies ₹700, signature cocktails ₹1,100–₹1,400, mocktails ₹600. All prices are exclusive of taxes. Complimentary chilled water, towels, and sunscreen are provided.

15.text: The Regal Aurum Fitness Centre is open 24/7 via room key card. Minimum age is 16; guests aged 16-18 must be with an adult. Proper gym attire and closed-toe athletic shoes are required – no sandals, jeans, or business wear. Personal training sessions cost ₹2,500 per 60 minutes and must be booked at least 6 hours in advance.

16.text: Pets are strictly prohibited at The Regal Aurum. The only exception is registered service animals with valid government documentation; emotional support animals do not qualify. An unauthorised pet discovered in a guest room will result in a ₹20,000 deep cleaning fee and possible eviction without refund.

17.text: All indoor areas of The Regal Aurum are non-smoking. Designated outdoor smoking zones exist at the south corner of the pool deck and in the garden near the entrance. Smoking indoors triggers a ₹12,000 deep cleaning penalty per incident. If a fire alarm is set off, the guest will also be charged the full cost of the fire department call-out and any property damage. Repeated violations lead to eviction without refund.

18.text: The Maharaja Suite at The Regal Aurum includes complimentary round-trip airport transfers by chauffeured BMW 7 Series. A Mercedes S-Class can be requested at no extra cost. Club Aurum Room guests receive one complimentary one-way transfer in a BMW 5 Series; an additional one-way can be purchased for ₹4,000 plus 18% GST. Premier Room guests and other visitors can book a BMW 5 Series for ₹4,200 + tax (max 3 people, 3 suitcases), Mercedes E-Class for ₹5,200 + tax, or Toyota Innova Crysta for ₹3,200 + tax. All transfers include meet-and-greet, water, and Wi-Fi, and require booking at least 6 hours prior with flight details.

19.text: Parking at The Regal Aurum is complimentary valet service 24/7 for in-house guests. Self-parking is not available. EV charging is offered at two Type-2 7.2 kW stations near the entrance at ₹400 per session (up to 4 hours), billed to the room. Visitors and day guests pay ₹150 per hour for valet parking, with a daily max of ₹600, and no overnight parking is permitted.

20.text: The Regal Aurum is fully wheelchair accessible with ramps at all main entrances, elevators with braille, audio announcements, and low-level panels. Four ADA-compliant Premier Rooms feature roll-in showers, grab bars, hand-held showerheads, visual fire alarms, and door knock sensors. Complimentary wheelchairs are available from the Front Desk on a first-come, first-served basis. Accessible restrooms are located on the lobby level and near restaurants.

21.text: The Regal Aurum accepts Visa, Mastercard, American Express, Diners Club International, RuPay credit and debit cards, UPI (Google Pay, PhonePe, BHIM), and NEFT/RTGS for advance deposits. Foreign currency exchange (cash) is available for USD, EUR, GBP, JPY, AUD, SGD, CAD; a valid passport and visa copy are required, and the rate updates every 4 hours. Cryptocurrency including Bitcoin and Ethereum is not accepted in any form.

22.text: Upon check-in at The Regal Aurum, a mandatory incidental security deposit is required per night of stay: ₹8,000 for Premier Rooms, ₹12,000 for Club Aurum Rooms, and ₹20,000 for the Maharaja Suite. This can be authorised on a credit card or placed as cash. Cash deposits are refunded after deducting charges, with any balance transferred via NEFT within 7 working days. Credit card pre-authorisations are released upon settlement; the release time depends on the issuing bank (typically 5-10 business days).

23.text: At The Regal Aurum, hotel guests may host visitors in public areas until 10:00 PM. After 10:00 PM, any visitor entering a guest room must present a valid government photo ID at the Front Desk and be registered by the guest. Overnight visitors staying past 11:00 PM are not permitted unless added to the reservation at an additional charge of ₹3,500 + 18% GST per night. Unregistered overnight visitors will incur a penalty equal to the full nightly room rate, and the visitor will be escorted out. Visitors are not allowed to use the pool, gym, or spa without a facility day pass.

24.text: Quiet hours at The Regal Aurum are strictly enforced from 10:00 PM to 7:00 AM. During this period, all noise must be inaudible in adjacent rooms and corridors. The enforcement protocol: first verified complaint results in a verbal warning, second complaint leads to a written notice and a ₹5,000 disturbance fee, and a third complaint causes eviction without refund with security involvement. Parties in guest rooms after 10:00 PM are prohibited.

25.text: The Royal Palate provides 24-hour in-room dining at The Regal Aurum. A delivery charge of ₹250 per order applies, waived for Maharaja Suite guests. Menu highlights: Continental breakfast ₹1,500, Indian breakfast ₹1,800, club sandwich ₹1,200, butter chicken with naan ₹1,600, pasta ₹1,400, desserts from ₹700. Prices exclude taxes. Orders can be placed by phone or in-room tablet.

26.text: Complimentary high-speed Wi-Fi is available throughout The Regal Aurum. Each guest room supports up to 4 devices with a bandwidth of 50 Mbps. Additional devices or higher speeds are not offered as standard. Log-in credentials are provided at check-in.

27.text: The in-room minibar at The Regal Aurum is fully stocked with snacks and beverages. Prices are listed inside the cabinet door; charges are posted to the guest folio upon consumption. The Maharaja Suite minibar is complimentary for all non-alcoholic beverages and house-pour spirits; premium alcohol incurs charges as per the menu. No outside beverages may be stored in the minibar.

28.text: Each room at The Regal Aurum includes a Nespresso coffee machine with complimentary daily capsules: 4 capsules in Premier Rooms, 6 in Club Aurum Rooms, and unlimited upon request in the Maharaja Suite. Additional capsules cost ₹150 each. An electric kettle with a selection of premium teas is complimentary in all rooms.

29.text: Luggage storage is provided complimentary at The Regal Aurum for guests arriving before check-in or after check-out. Items are kept in a secure storage room, and a claim ticket is issued. The hotel is not liable for valuables left in stored luggage; use the in-room safe for high-value items.

30.text: Should a guest depart earlier than the confirmed check-out date, The Regal Aurum charges a penalty equal to the remaining nights' room charges unless the Front Desk is notified at least 24 hours in advance. This policy does not apply to non-refundable bookings, where no refund is granted.

31.text: The Regal Aurum Club Aurum Lounge, located on the 10th floor, is exclusive to Club Aurum Room and Maharaja Suite guests. It offers personalised check-in/out, all-day tea, coffee, and light refreshments, and evening cocktails with gourmet canapés from 6:00 PM to 8:00 PM. A private meeting room can be booked complimentary for 2 hours per stay, subject to availability and prior reservation.

32.text: The dress code for Zafran is strictly enforced. Men must wear collared shirts, full-length trousers, and closed shoes; jackets are preferred but loaners are available. Women are required to wear smart ethnic or formal evening attire. Shorts, sandals, flip-flops, and sleeveless T-shirts are not permitted for guests over 10 years old. The restaurant reserves the right to refuse entry to anyone not meeting the standard.

33.text: Commercial photography and filming are not allowed anywhere on The Regal Aurum property without prior written permission from the hotel’s marketing department. Personal photos for non-commercial use are permitted as long as they do not disturb other guests or capture staff without consent.

34.text: Laundry, dry-cleaning, and pressing services are available at The Regal Aurum. Same-day service is offered if items are collected by 9:00 AM and returned by 7:00 PM. Express 4-hour service is available at a 50% surcharge. Price lists are in the wardrobe; standard shirt pressing starts at ₹400. The Maharaja Suite includes complimentary pressing of 4 garments per day and shoe shine.

35.text: Evening turndown service at The Regal Aurum is performed between 6:00 PM and 9:00 PM. It includes curtain draw, bedside water and glass, a small chocolate or sweet, and slippers placed by the bed. Guests may opt out via the privacy sign or inform the front desk. Additional amenities like extra pillows can be requested during turndown.

36.text: The electrical outlets in The Regal Aurum guest rooms are 220-240V, 50Hz, with Type C, D, and M sockets. Universal adapters are available upon request from housekeeping at no charge. Guests bringing appliances from regions with 110V should bring their own voltage converters.

37.text: Lost and found items at The Regal Aurum are logged and stored for 90 days. To claim an item, guests must contact the hotel with a description and the date of stay. Items not claimed within 90 days are donated or disposed of. The hotel ships items at the guest's expense via a courier arranged by the hotel.

38.text: Only one rollaway bed is permitted per room at The Regal Aurum and only in the Premier and Club Aurum categories. The Maharaja Suite does not accept a rollaway due to its layout. Rollaway bed charge is ₹2,000 per night plus 18% GST and must be requested at the time of booking; day-of requests may not be accommodated.

39.text: The Regal Aurum provides a complimentary shoe shine service for all guests upon request. For Maharaja Suite guests, it is automatically offered as part of the daily butler service. Shoes left with the butler by 10:00 PM are returned by 7:00 AM next morning.

40.text: Group bookings of more than 5 rooms at The Regal Aurum are subject to a separate contract. A non-refundable deposit of 50% of the total stay is required 30 days before arrival, with the balance due 14 days prior. Cancellation policies for groups are customised and may be stricter than individual policies. Contact the hotel's group sales team for details.

41.text: The minimum age to check in at The Regal Aurum is 18 years. A valid government photo ID and a credit card or cash deposit are mandatory. Guests under 18 must be accompanied by an adult and registered as an additional guest.

42.text: Outside food and beverages are not permitted anywhere on The Regal Aurum property, including guest rooms, with the exception of special baby food or medical dietary requirements which must be declared at check-in. Violation may result in a ₹5,000 cleanliness surcharge.

43.text: The Regal Aurum offers currency exchange services at the front desk for hotel guests only. Accepted foreign currencies are USD, EUR, GBP, JPY, AUD, SGD, and CAD. The exchange rate is updated every 4 hours and a valid passport with visa copy is required. There is no service fee for hotel guests, but a maximum of ₹50,000 equivalent per transaction applies.

44.text: All public areas and guest floors at The Regal Aurum are under CCTV surveillance 24/7 for security. Recordings are kept for 30 days and may be accessed by management in case of incidents. Guest room corridors are monitored; inside guest rooms there is no surveillance.

45.text: The temperature control in each room is individually adjustable via a wall thermostat. The cooling and heating system operates 24/7. Guests can set the temperature between 18°C and 26°C. For technical issues, engineering is available round the clock by dialling guest services.

46.text: Room upgrades at The Regal Aurum are possible based on availability and are charged at the difference between the booked category and the higher category's nightly rate. Upgrades to the Maharaja Suite from a lower category require a minimum supplement of ₹1,15,000 per night. Upgrade requests are handled at check-in; advanced guaranteed upgrades can be booked for a set fee.

47.text: Iron and ironing board are standard in every room at The Regal Aurum. Additionally, pressing services are available via butler in Club Aurum and Maharaja Suite. For Premier Rooms, a dedicated pressing service is chargeable as per laundry menu.

48.text: The Regal Aurum has a strict no-party policy in guest rooms. Social gatherings after 10:00 PM are not allowed. Any event requiring entertainment, catering, or exceeding room occupancy must be booked through the hotel's banquets and events team. Unauthorised parties will be shut down and may result in eviction without refund.

49.text: Guests with allergies or specific medical needs can inform The Regal Aurum in advance. Hypoallergenic pillows and bedding are available from the pillow menu. The kitchen can accommodate common dietary restrictions (gluten-free, lactose-free, nut-free) with 24-hour notice for in-room dining and restaurant reservations. A detailed allergy chart can be requested from the chef.

50.text: The Regal Aurum is located in the Diplomatic Enclave, Sardar Patel Marg, New Delhi – 110021. The nearest airport is Indira Gandhi International Airport (DEL), approximately 12 km away. The hotel is within 5 km of major landmarks such as Rashtrapati Bhavan and India Gate. Nearby metro station is Lok Kalyan Marg (Yellow Line), 1.5 km away. Taxi and app-based ride services are readily available.

63.text: If retrieved context does not explicitly answer a question, the assistant must refuse rather than infer, estimate, extrapolate, assume, or guess.

64.text: The assistant has no access to live hotel systems, reservation databases, guest records, payment systems, or operational dashboards.
